job_title: AI and Data Science Engineer II
strengths: Strong SQL and Python ETL experience
Proven analytics with quantified business impact
weaknesses: Limited explicit ML model deployment experience
No clear experience with boosted trees/logistic regression listed
Sparse mention of unsupervised models or clustering
No deep learning or reinforcement learning evidence
improvement_bullets: Engineered predictive features from raw loan data and implemented supervised machine learning models, including logistic regression and classification techniques, to identify default risk factors.
Applied unsupervised clustering techniques to high-dimensional customer data, identifying distinct segments to improve the precision of targeted marketing campaigns and enhance campaign measurement.
Performed rigorous A/B testing on marketing initiatives and digital touchpoints to evaluate performance, optimize conversion rates, and provide actionable recommendations for campaign ROI.
Developed end-to-end machine learning pipelines for lead-to-loyalty orchestration, utilizing Python libraries to clean and transform marketing datasets for predictive model ingestion.
Designed and validated machine learning proofs of concept, interpreting complex model results into strategic insights for stakeholders to drive customer-centric business value.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the AI and Data Science Engineer II opportunity with Deloitte. I am interested in this opportunity because of Deloitte's reputation for integrating advanced analytics and Generative AI into client-facing marketing strategies. What interests me about working for Deloitte is its commitment to solving complex, customer-centric problems through innovation, which inspires me because I am passionate about translating raw data into meaningful business growth. I believe my expertise in marketing analytics and my strong proficiency in Python and SQL-based ETL pipelines would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data-driven decision-making. In fact, while at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed time-series models and customer segmentation strategies that resulted in a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the AI and Data Science Engineer II role at Deloitte would allow me to bring my predictive modeling skills to bear on key marketing and advertising challenges. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my exploratory data analysis and data visualization skills. I conducted deep-dive analyses on 250K+ row datasets, identifying demographic patterns that informed city safety strategies and presented these findings to diverse stakeholders. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my machine learning and predictive modeling skills in working on personalized marketing platforms at Deloitte. I know that my technical background and my commitment to data-driven storytelling align with what it takes to succeed at the AI and Data Science Engineer II role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
